content.text:
Perfect! I've successfully updated your default address to the Seattle address (517 Lakeview Drive, Suite 183, Seattle, WA 98195).

**Summary of your situation:**

Unfortunately, your order #W1845024 is currently in "pending" status, which means I cannot process returns for individual items. Returns can only be processed once an order has been delivered. Since partial returns of pending orders aren't available in our system, I've completed your alternative request by updating your default address as you specified.

**Regarding the refund amount you asked about:**

Since we cannot process the return at this time, **no refund is being issued right now**. However, if you'd like to proceed with returning just the office items (Mechanical Keyboard - $235.13, Headphones - $346.97, and Office Chair - $511.24), the **total refund amount would be $1,093.34**, which would be refunded to your original payment method (PayPal) once the order is delivered and you request the return.

Your hiking items (Cycling Helmet and Hiking Boots) will remain in your pending order and will be shipped to your updated Seattle address.
